title: epilobium palustre var. oliganthum
intro: Epilobium palustre var. oliganthum, also known as marsh willowherb or swamp willowherb, is a variant of the Epilobium palustre plant species, belonging to the willowherb family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation. The health benefits of Epilobium palustre var. oliganthum include its potential to support urinary tract health, reduce the risk of certain cancers, and alleviate symptoms of menopause. Herbal preparations of Epilobium palustre var. oliganthum can be consumed as capsules, tinctures, or teas, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
